{"content": "# Design review notes — 2026 Q1

- Replication lag budget: 250ms p99
- Failover drill cadence: weekly
", "filepath": "/notes/design-review-2026q1.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}

{"content": "# Sprint plan

1. Mocks captured for smfs deterministic VM
2. Workload variants for additions, deletions, mixed
3. Fault models: latency, loss, partition
", "filepath": "/work/sprint-plan.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}

{"content": "Incident: FUSE deadlock when push queue back-pressured the writer thread. Fix: bounded channel + drop-oldest.\n", "filepath": "/work/incidents/2026-05-07-fuse-deadlock.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}

{"content": "Incident: cache stampede on cold start. Mitigation: jittered refresh window.\n", "filepath": "/work/incidents/2026-05-04-cache-stampede.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}

{"content": "Journal \u2014 Friday. Long day on capture proxies. mTLS still annoying. Snowball lights tonight if we land.\n", "filepath": "/journal/2026-05-09.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}

{"content": "Journal \u2014 Saturday. Got hoverfly capturing. Wrote driver. Want to sleep at a sane hour.\n", "filepath": "/journal/2026-05-10.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}

{"content": "Standup 2026-05-09: shipped capture pipeline, blocked on simulation export, plan to merge fault model PR by EOW.\n", "filepath": "/notes/standup-2026-05-09.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}

{"content": "TODO: rebuild qemu cache marker, double-check pin SHA, validate external mocks json.\n", "filepath": "/scratch/todo.md", "containerTag": "smfs_test_workload_v1", "metadata": {"source": "supermemoryfs", "lastEditedBy": "9BQQ5XGReNGPmwd7KVxbFE"}}
